title: move-eval-heavy-tests-to-internal-e2etest
description:
Move heavy tests from internal/eval/ to internal/e2etest/ now that e2etest is under internal/.

## What to do

1. Export the pack test helpers in internal/eval/:
   - Move dbPack, findRuleByID, matchPackDestructive, matchRuleCommand, dbPackIDs
     from internal/eval/pack_helpers_test.go into a real (non-test) file like
     internal/eval/testhelpers.go (exported names: DBPack, FindRuleByID, etc.)
   - Or alternatively, recreate these helpers in internal/e2etest/ since they
     only use exported APIs from packs and parse
2. Move golden test infrastructure (LoadCorpus, RunCorpus, GoldenEntry,
   parseDecision, parseSeverity, parseConfidence) — these are already exported
   names defined in golden_test.go. Move to internal/e2etest/eval_golden.go
3. Move these test files to internal/e2etest/ (change package to e2etest,
   update imports to use eval. and evalcore. prefixes):
   - internal/eval/golden_test.go
   - internal/eval/bench_test.go
   - internal/eval/db_benchmark_test.go
   - internal/eval/db_oracle_test.go
   - internal/eval/db_property_test.go
   - internal/eval/db_fault_test.go
   - internal/eval/db_security_test.go
   - internal/eval/pack_helpers_test.go (after exporting or recreating helpers)
4. Delete internal/eval/packs_test.go (the blank-import file) — no longer needed
   if no eval tests require pack registration
5. Update Makefile test-integration target if needed
6. Run tests to verify

## Keep in internal/eval/ (lightweight unit tests)
- ahocorasick_test.go (accesses unexported ahoCorasick struct)
- prefilter_test.go (tests internal PreFilter behavior)

## Depends on
dcg-n0e.1 (relocate e2etest to internal/e2etest) must be done first.
